mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_quota (user_id, model_id, quota_date, used_tokens, used_requests, limit_tokens, limit_requests, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{modelId}, #{quotaDate}, #{tokens}, #{requests}, 100000, 100, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE used_tokens = used_tokens + #{tokens}, used_requests = used_requests + #{requests}, updated_at = NOW()
